page_content:
FRENCH STUDIES MINOR

School of Languages, Literatures, and Cultures (SLLC) http://sllc.umd.edu/french/

Program Director: Hervé-Thomas Campangne, Ph.D.

This 21-credit minor will provide students with a solid overview of linguistic, cultural, and literary aspects of the study of French.

To make an appointment to explore or declare a minor, go to http:// arhu.umd.edu/academics/undergraduate-studies/minors/.
